production_custom_tools.send_booking_sms: PASS simulated sms_sent false sms_simulated true
production_custom_tools.candidate_book_appointment_cal: PASS dry_run request-shape validation, no booking created

retell_batch_tests.finding: Phone booking skipped create_lead before native Cal.com booking.
Remaining issues: final echo edge cases, picture-policy invention, and Retell loop endings on pressure/warranty prompts.

Picture-policy fixed; address-correction confirmation still needed tightening. Some specific-time failures were simulator-choice mismatches where the user asked for follow-up instead of booking an offered slot.

Final full regression passed 30/31. The single non-pass was a scenario mismatch: the simulated caller declined the offered slot and asked for follow-up, so the agent correctly did not book or confirm an appointment.
Post-binding regression passed 30/31. The single non-pass was the same scenario mismatch: the simulated caller declined the offered slot and asked for follow-up, so the agent correctly did not book.
Final inbound smoke batch passed 6/6 after disabling backchanneling and tightening the service-list response.

Phone-number confirmation and Cal.com phone visibility verified in tool arguments. Native book_appointment_cal exposed no dedicated phone field, so the prompt uses the booking name fallback such as "Maria - phone +17185550100". The single failed judge result was the alternate-phone scenario, but actual create_lead args included caller_phone plus alternate_phone and the booking name used the alternate phone.

real_booking.reason: No explicit approval was given for Codex to create a controlled real booking in this run.
real_booking.user_report: User reported Retell native Cal.com functions created correct bookings that appeared on Cal.com.
real_booking.next_step: Run one controlled live candidate call or approved test booking and verify it appears in Cal.com.
